author: AbhisekBasu1
name: Non-record: 11L EMA + GPTQ-lite + warmdown3500 + QAT@0.15
blurb: Validated 8xH100 SXM control run of the patched #414-class stack: EMA every step, GPTQ-lite post-training quantization, warmdown=3500, late QAT threshold=0.15, XSA-last-4, VE128, LN scale, SmearGate, BigramHash, int6+zstd-22, sliding-window eval stride=64. Stronger than the earlier #414-class control, but not a current SOTA claim.
